headline: Exelon to Announce First Quarter Results on May 6
summary: CHICAGO, April 01, 2026--Exelon will hold its first quarter 2026 earnings conference call at 9:00 a.m. CT / 10:00 a.m. ET on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. The conference call will be led by Exelon President and CEO, Calvin Butler, and Exelon Executive Vice President and CFO, Jeanne Jones.

headline: PECO seeks $429M rate hike, partly to reduce power outages
summary: At nearly 88%, PECO’s capex to net plant ratio is higher than that of 16 peer utilities, indicating a “risk level that is higher than that of the companies in the proxy group,” said Ann Bulkley, a principal at The Brattle Group who testified in support of the rate request.

headline: Exelon Promise Links Customer Relief To Long Term Earnings And Risk
summary: Exelon and its Maryland subsidiary BGE launched "The Exelon Promise," a customer focused program targeting rising energy costs. The initiative combines immediate bill relief measures with longer term efforts to address affordability and reliability across the system. The program is framed as a company wide response to growing energy demand and customer cost pressures. Exelon (NasdaqGS:EXC), recently trading at $49.02, is drawing fresh attention for how it is responding to customer...
